improvements_applied: Added OpenStreetMap for busy road (90%+ accuracy, FREE)
Added Google Maps for corner block (95%+ accuracy)

observations: Curb appeal is strong with clean, neutral exterior paint and neatly trimmed hedges.
Tile roof appears intact with uniform tiles and no visible sagging.
Driveway and entry path are well-maintained; modern, two-car garage door.
Front entry has a small arch and dark-framed doors; overall presentation is polished.
Interior kitchen is updated with white gloss cabinetry, quartz counters, and stainless appliances.
Living area features a light, neutral palette, recessed lighting, and ceiling fans; surfaces appear well-kept.
Outdoor covered patio with dining area overlooks a fenced pool; deck and lawn look well-maintained.
Landscaping includes a manicured lawn, small shrubs, and a flowering tree adding curb appeal.
building_condition.evidence: Exteriors show fresh paint, tidy landscaping, and clean hardscape; interiors show modern kitchen and open-plan living; backyard features a secure pool with a covered patio.
